name: ATLED CORP.
summary: ATLED CORP. engages in the development and sale of software solutions in Japan. It offers X-point, a workflow system for medium-sized and small businesses; X-point Cloud, a cloud workflow system for small businesses; and Agile Works, an enterprise workflow system for large and medium-sized enterprises. The company also provides cloud services. ATLED CORP. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
